settlement_status.description: Settlement details, totals, breakdown by status, net amounts, trace numbers for MID + date range or payout id

failure_analysis.description: Failure diagnostics, return code breakdown, root cause and CTA recommendations

trend_analysis.description: Rolling trend metrics, avg settlement time, bank/routing failure %, provisional credit lag

reserve_balance.description: Reserve account balance lookup and status

settlement_config.description: Settlement schedule, frequency, type and hardcoded rail timing rules

downtime_events.description: Bank or payment rail downtime / outage events lookup

chargeback_info.description: Chargeback / dispute lookup by MID or transaction ID
